body: Ravi, great catching up with you at the [Climate Tech Summit](events/climate-tech-summit-2025) last week — your take on the hardware bottlenecks in grid-scale storage really stuck with me. I've been doing a deeper look at a few companies in that space, and I think there might be a co-investment opportunity worth exploring together. [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital) has been quietly building conviction around edge compute infrastructure for renewable management, and one company in particular is close to closing their Series A with room for a strategic co-lead. I know Founders Fund has been active in adjacent bets, so I figured you'd be the right person to loop in before we get further into diligence. Would love to grab 30 minutes this week or next — does Thursday afternoon work on your end?
